description: Read AI is a meeting intelligence service that records and analyzes meetings to produce transcripts, summaries, action items, and related metadata. It provides access to a user's meeting data through its web app and programmatic interfaces.
summary: Read AI exposes two developer integration surfaces in open beta: a REST API at `https://api.read.ai/` and a remote MCP server at `https://api.read.ai/mcp`, both authenticated with Read-issued OAuth 2.1 tokens obtained via dynamic client registration and user consent.
